narrative:
Massie Township has 942 registered voters, with 49.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.5 percentage points.
